item.title: One Easy Trick to Stop Cables Tangling Ever Again
item.description: Messy cables are a nightmare—but one simple trick keeps them neat forever. What’s the easy hack that saves time and frustration?

item.title: A builder looks back: nostalgia on the tools
item.description: The life of a builder is full of memorable moments, hard lessons, and quiet pride in the work left behind. A reflective look at what the trade really means over a lifetime. What does your work mean to you?

item.title: Two days of block laying on the basement build
item.description: Two full days of block laying — the kind of steady, methodical work that a proper basement build demands. Follow along as the walls rise course by course. How long do you think the full basement will take?

item.title: How to lay a solid block foundation from scratch
item.description: A strong build starts with a strong foundation — and this video walks through the process of laying a block foundation the right way. A must-watch for anyone planning a serious construction project. Have you ever laid blocks before?
